reasons: Tigreal's crowd control can create multiple marked targets for Arlott's Demon Gaze interaction.
Tigreal's grouping makes Arlott's dash reset and area follow-up easier to execute.

proof.summary: Tigreal controls and groups enemies, allowing Arlott to exploit marked targets with repeated Vengeance pressure.
worksBestWhen: Arlott is near enough for marks and follow-up.
Tigreal catches multiple enemies rather than only a tank.
Arlott saves Vengeance for marked targets.
failureCases: Arlott is too far away when Tigreal engages.
Enemies use control immunity or disengage after the pull.
Arlott dashes into a bad position without team follow-up.

reasons: Atlas can pull enemies into one location, giving Arlott a dense group of controlled targets to mark and dash through.
Arlott can follow Atlas's engage with Final Slash or Vengeance resets.

proof.summary: Atlas creates a grouped control setup, and Arlott converts it into marked-target dash pressure.
worksBestWhen: Atlas drops enemies within Arlott's follow-up range.
Arlott saves Vengeance for marked targets.
failureCases: Arlott spends Vengeance on an unmarked target.
Enemy backline stays outside the grouped area.

reasons: Minotaur's area control can mark enemies for Arlott's Vengeance follow-up.
Minotaur adds frontline presence so Arlott can enter after the first control layer.

proof.summary: Minotaur starts the control layer, while Arlott uses the CC-applied marks to dash and continue the fight.
worksBestWhen: Arlott waits for the crowd-control window and then commits.
Arlott has enough space to dash through marked targets.
failureCases: Enemies disengage before Arlott can chain Vengeance.

reasons: Carmilla's linked enemies can spread control and damage value while Arlott attacks marked targets.
Arlott's own control and dash pressure help keep linked enemies under threat.

proof.summary: Carmilla links enemies, and Arlott adds repeated dash damage plus control pressure into the linked group.
worksBestWhen: Carmilla links enemies before Arlott commits.
Arlott focuses marked targets inside the link window.
The enemy team remains grouped during the link.
failureCases: Arlott dashes beyond Carmilla's linked area.

reasons: Angela can shield and attach to Arlott before he dives into marked-target chains.
Arlott benefits from extra protection because he often commits forward to keep Vengeance resets going.

proof.summary: Angela gives Arlott protection during his dive sequence, helping him survive while chaining marked targets.
worksBestWhen: Arlott has marked targets ready or nearby CC setup.
Arlott has enough follow-up to continue after the shield.
failureCases: Angela's shield is forced too early.
Enemy suppression or burst stops Arlott before he can reset Vengeance.
